benefits.name: Global Hotel Partner Discount
benefits.headline: Save 25% on thousands of hotels worldwide
benefits.description: Alumni receive an exclusive 25% discount on participating hotels in major cities worldwide when booking through the alumni travel portal.
benefits.eligibility: Available to all alumni and their immediate family members.
benefits.redemption_instructions: Access the alumni travel portal using your alumni ID and follow the hotel booking link. Discount is applied automatically at checkout.
benefits.exclusions: Blackout dates during major holidays and special events may apply.

benefits.name: Alumni Car Rental Savings
benefits.headline: 20% off car rentals plus free GPS
benefits.description: Enjoy 20% off base rates at participating locations, with a complimentary GPS included on rentals of 3 days or more.
benefits.discount_description: 20% off base daily and weekly rental rates
benefits.eligibility: All alumni; driver must meet standard rental qualifications.
benefits.redemption_instructions: Use the alumni discount code ALUM20 when reserving online or by phone.
benefits.exclusions: Luxury and specialty vehicle classes excluded. Taxes and fees not discounted.
benefits.geographic_limitations: Valid in the United States and Canada.

benefits.name: Boutique Hotel Alumni Rate
benefits.headline: 15% off independent boutique hotels
benefits.description: Discover unique stays at independent boutique hotels with a special alumni discount.
benefits.discount_description: 15% off the nightly room rate at participating hotels.
benefits.redemption_instructions: Book through the IndieStay alumni booking page linked from the alumni benefits portal.
benefits.exclusions: Offer not valid on pre-paid nonrefundable rates.

benefits.name: Alumni Cruise Savings
benefits.headline: 10% onboard credit on select cruises
benefits.description: Receive an onboard credit equal to 10% of your cruise fare on eligible itineraries.
benefits.discount_description: 10% onboard credit based on cruise fare (excluding taxes and fees).
benefits.eligibility: Alumni and up to three guests traveling on the same reservation.
benefits.redemption_instructions: Mention the alumni code AQALUM10 when booking through the call center or approved travel agent.
benefits.exclusions: Not combinable with certain promotional fares.
benefits.geographic_limitations: Caribbean, Alaska, and Mediterranean sailings only.

benefits.name: Airport Parking Discount
benefits.headline: 8% off long-term airport parking
benefits.description: Save on off-site airport parking at major U.S. airports.
benefits.redemption_instructions: Enter your alumni promo code at checkout when reserving parking.
benefits.exclusions: Not valid with other coupons or discounts.

benefits.name: High-Speed Rail Alumni Fare
benefits.headline: 12% off select high-speed rail tickets
benefits.description: Travel sustainably with a 12% alumni discount on flexible high-speed rail tickets.
benefits.discount_description: 12% off standard flexible fares in second and first class.
benefits.eligibility: Alumni traveling in Europe; alumni card may be requested onboard.
benefits.redemption_instructions: Book via the alumni portal link to have the discount applied automatically.
benefits.exclusions: Not valid on promotional or last-minute flash fares.

benefits.name: Campus-area Restaurant Discount
benefits.headline: 10% off food at participating campus-area restaurants
benefits.description: Show your alumni card at participating restaurants near campus to receive 10% off your meal.
benefits.discount_description: 10% off pre-tax food and non-alcoholic beverages.
benefits.redemption_instructions: Present your alumni card or digital alumni ID when paying.

benefits.name: Online Retailer Alumni Promo
benefits.headline: 5% off select electronics and accessories
benefits.description: Save on laptops, tablets, and accessories from our preferred online retail partner.
benefits.redemption_instructions: Enter alumni promo code ALUM5 at checkout.
benefits.exclusions: Certain brands and sale items excluded.
benefits.geographic_limitations: Ships to locations where TechMart operates.

benefits.name: Auto & Home Insurance Savings
benefits.headline: Exclusive alumni group insurance rates
benefits.description: Bundle auto and home insurance for potential savings compared to standard rates.
benefits.discount_description: Average savings of 12% for qualifying policyholders.
benefits.eligibility: Available to alumni residing in eligible states.
benefits.redemption_instructions: Request a quote using the alumni link or mention the alumni group code to an agent.
benefits.exclusions: Coverage and savings vary by state and underwriting.

benefits.name: Museum Membership Discount
benefits.headline: 20% off annual membership at partner museums
benefits.description: Enjoy discounted memberships at select art and science museums.
benefits.redemption_instructions: Present alumni card at the ticket desk or redeem code online.
benefits.exclusions: Does not apply to special patron levels.

benefits.name: Continuing Education Course Discount
benefits.headline: 15% off professional development courses
benefits.description: Advance your career with discounted non-credit professional development courses.
benefits.discount_description: 15% tuition discount on eligible short courses.
benefits.redemption_instructions: Enter your alumni ID at registration checkout.
benefits.exclusions: Not valid on certificate programs or degree tuition.

contact_lists.name: My Alumni Contacts
contact_lists.description: Default list for saved alumni profiles and networking contacts.

contact_lists.name: San Francisco Tech Network
contact_lists.description: Contacts for San Francisco technology and software alumni.

funds.name: Student Scholarships Fund
funds.description: Provides need-based and merit scholarships to current undergraduate and graduate students.

funds.name: Annual Fund
funds.description: Flexible support for the university's greatest immediate needs.

funds.name: Athletics Excellence Fund
funds.description: Supports varsity and club sports, facilities, and student-athlete development.

funds.name: Libraries and Learning Resources Fund
funds.description: Enhances library collections, study spaces, and digital resources.

funds.name: President's Unrestricted Fund
funds.description: Allows university leadership to direct support where it is most needed.

mentor_expertise_topics.name: Technology
mentor_expertise_topics.description: Software, hardware, IT infrastructure, and emerging technologies.

mentor_expertise_topics.name: Entrepreneurship
mentor_expertise_topics.description: Starting, funding, and scaling new ventures.

mentor_expertise_topics.name: Leadership & Management
mentor_expertise_topics.description: People management, leadership development, and organizational culture.

mentor_expertise_topics.name: Product Management
mentor_expertise_topics.description: Product strategy, roadmapping, and cross-functional collaboration.

mentor_expertise_topics.name: Data Science & Analytics
mentor_expertise_topics.description: Statistics, machine learning, and applied analytics careers.

mentor_expertise_topics.name: Other / General Career Guidance
mentor_expertise_topics.description: General mentoring topics not covered by other categories.

mentoring_programs.name: Student-Alumni Mentoring Program
mentoring_programs.description: Pairs alumni with current undergraduate and graduate students for one-on-one career exploration, networking, and professional skill-building.

mentoring_programs.name: Recent Graduates Career Launch Mentoring
mentoring_programs.description: Supports alumni within five years of graduation as they transition into the workforce.

mentoring_programs.name: Mid-Career Alumni Peer Circles
mentoring_programs.description: Small peer groups facilitated by experienced alumni to discuss leadership, career change, and work-life balance.

mentoring_programs.name: Global Alumni Mentoring Network
mentoring_programs.description: Flexible, self-service platform connecting alumni around the world for short-term mentoring conversations.

mentoring_programs.name: First-Generation Student Mentors
mentoring_programs.description: Connects first-generation students with alumni who were first-generation students themselves.

newsletter_topics.name: Career Services
newsletter_topics.description: Job postings, career resources, and professional development opportunities.

newsletter_topics.name: Alumni Events
newsletter_topics.description: Invitations to regional events, reunions, and virtual programs.

newsletter_topics.name: University News
newsletter_topics.description: Major announcements, campus updates, and leadership messages.

newsletter_topics.name: Research Highlights
newsletter_topics.description: Stories about groundbreaking research and faculty achievements.

newsletter_topics.name: Fundraising Campaigns
newsletter_topics.description: Campaign updates, impact stories, and giving opportunities.

scholarships.name: Alumni Legacy Undergraduate Scholarship
scholarships.description: A merit-based scholarship for children of alumni enrolled full-time in an undergraduate degree program.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Applicant must be a child (including adopted or stepchild) of a degreed alumnus/alumna and maintain a minimum 3.3 GPA.
scholarships.application_requirements: Online application, transcript, two recommendation letters, and personal statement.

scholarships.name: Children of Alumni Access Grant
scholarships.description: Need-based grant for undergraduate children of alumni to help cover tuition and fees.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Open to dependent children of alumni with demonstrated financial need as determined by the financial aid office.
scholarships.application_requirements: FAFSA or international financial aid form, short essay, and confirmation of alumni relationship.

scholarships.name: Alumni Family Scholars Award
scholarships.description: Recognizes academic excellence and leadership among undergraduate children of alumni.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Applicant must be a child of an alum and demonstrate leadership in co-curricular activities.
scholarships.application_requirements: Online application, leadership resume, one faculty recommendation.

scholarships.name: Alumni Legacy First-Year Scholarship
scholarships.description: One-time scholarship for first-year undergraduates who are children of alumni.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Incoming first-year student with at least one parent who is a degreed alum.
scholarships.application_requirements: Submit by December 15 with personal statement on family connection to the university.

scholarships.name: Graduate Studies Award for Children of Alumni
scholarships.description: Supports children of alumni pursuing graduate or professional degrees at the university.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Admitted to an eligible graduate or professional program.
scholarships.application_requirements: Graduate admission, statement of purpose, and alumni affiliation verification.

scholarships.name: Grandchildren of Alumni Scholarship
scholarships.description: Provides partial tuition support for grandchildren of alumni enrolled as undergraduates.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Applicant must be a biological or adopted grandchild of a degreed alumnus/alumna.
scholarships.application_requirements: Verification of alumni status, short essay on the impact of education.

scholarships.name: Alumni Returning to Study Grant
scholarships.description: Supports alumni returning for additional undergraduate or certificate coursework.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Must hold a prior degree from the university and be enrolled in additional coursework.
scholarships.application_requirements: Statement of educational goals and unofficial transcript.

scholarships.name: Student Research and Innovation Grant
scholarships.description: Provides funding for current students engaged in independent research or innovation projects.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Open to all currently enrolled undergraduates with a faculty sponsor.
scholarships.application_requirements: Project proposal, budget, and faculty endorsement.

scholarships.name: First-Generation Student Support Scholarship
scholarships.description: Supports first-generation college students with demonstrated financial need.
scholarships.eligibility_details: First-generation status and at least half-time enrollment.
scholarships.application_requirements: Personal statement and financial aid documentation.

scholarships.name: Alumni Regional Undergraduate Award
scholarships.description: Scholarship for undergraduate children of alumni residing outside the home state.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Must be classified as out-of-state for tuition purposes and have at least one alumni parent.
scholarships.application_requirements: Proof of residency, transcript, and short essay.

scholarships.name: Community Impact Award
scholarships.description: Recognizes students or alumni who have made significant contributions to their communities.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Open to current students and alumni; self- or peer nominations accepted.
scholarships.application_requirements: Nomination form, letters of support, and impact statement.

scholarships.name: Alumni Legacy Honors Scholarship
scholarships.description: Highly competitive scholarship for top-performing children of alumni entering the university honors program.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Must be admitted to the honors college, be a child of an alum, and demonstrate exceptional academic performance and leadership.
scholarships.application_requirements: Honors application, interview, and two recommendation letters.

scholarships.name: Alumni Family Study Abroad Scholarship
scholarships.description: Supports children of alumni participating in approved undergraduate study abroad programs.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Child of an alumnus/alumna participating in a semester or year-long study abroad program.
scholarships.application_requirements: Program acceptance letter, budget, and essay on goals for study abroad.

scholarships.name: Legacy STEM Scholars Fund
scholarships.description: For undergraduate children of alumni pursuing majors in science, technology, engineering, or mathematics.
scholarships.eligibility_details: Declared STEM major and at least one parent who is an alum.
scholarships.application_requirements: Faculty recommendation in STEM field, transcript, and short essay.

event_ticket_types.name: Early Bird Alumni Admission
event_ticket_types.description: Discounted ticket for alumni who register at least two weeks in advance.

event_ticket_types.name: Standard Alumni Admission
event_ticket_types.description: Regular admission ticket for alumni and guests.

event_ticket_types.name: Premium Networking Pass
event_ticket_types.description: Includes access to a pre-event reception with industry leaders and reserved seating.

event_ticket_types.name: Early Bird Admission
event_ticket_types.description: Early registration discount for the Chicago Alumni Industry Mixer.

event_ticket_types.name: Standard Admission
event_ticket_types.description: General admission for alumni and professional guests.

event_ticket_types.name: Corporate Sponsor Package
event_ticket_types.description: Includes four admissions and logo recognition on event materials.

event_ticket_types.name: General Admission
event_ticket_types.description: Admission to the Chicago campus lecture and Q&A.

event_ticket_types.name: Current Student Ticket
event_ticket_types.description: Discounted ticket for currently enrolled students (valid ID required).

event_ticket_types.name: General Networking Admission
event_ticket_types.description: Admission to the New York City alumni networking reception.

event_ticket_types.name: VIP Admission
event_ticket_types.description: Includes drink tickets and access to the VIP lounge area.

event_ticket_types.name: General Admission
event_ticket_types.description: Standard ticket for the San Francisco Tech Alumni Meetup.

event_ticket_types.name: Student & Young Alumni Ticket
event_ticket_types.description: Discounted ticket for current students and alumni from the last five years.

event_ticket_types.name: General Admission
event_ticket_types.description: Admission to the Chicago Spring Alumni Networking Social.

event_ticket_types.name: Young Alumni Ticket
event_ticket_types.description: Reduced-price ticket for alumni who graduated in the last 10 years.

events.name: Chicago Tech & Startups Alumni Networking Night
events.description: Connect with fellow alumni working in technology and startups across the Chicago area. Enjoy light appetizers, a brief panel, and structured networking rounds focused on product, engineering, and founder stories.

events.name: Chicago Cross-Industry Alumni Mixer
events.description: An informal after-work mixer bringing together alumni from technology, finance, consulting, healthcare, and more. Includes hosted appetizers and facilitated introductions by industry table.

events.name: Campus Lecture: The Future of Urban Innovation
events.description: Join faculty and alumni experts for a conversation on how data, design, and policy are reshaping cities. Reception to follow the lecture.

events.name: New York City Spring Alumni Networking Reception
events.description: A citywide reception for alumni in finance, media, technology, and the arts. Includes brief remarks from the Dean and open networking.

events.name: San Francisco Tech Alumni Meetup
events.description: Monthly gathering for alumni working in software engineering, product management, and data science across the Bay Area.

events.name: Chicago Spring Alumni Networking Social
events.description: Celebrate the end of the academic year with a casual networking social at a rooftop venue in downtown Chicago.

events.name: San Francisco Alumni & Families Spring Picnic
events.description: Bring your family for an afternoon of food, games, and community in Golden Gate Park with fellow alumni.

events.name: Career Transitions for California Alumni: Webinar Series Kickoff
events.description: A virtual session focused on navigating career change, featuring alumni panelists from technology, consulting, and nonprofit sectors.

events.name: Alumni Homecoming & Reunion Weekend 2026
events.description: A full weekend of events including class reunions, campus tours, lectures, and a family tailgate.

events.name: Global Alumni Day of Service 2026
events.description: Join alumni around the world in coordinated service projects supporting local communities.

events.name: Virtual Panel: Alumni Founders on Entrepreneurship & Innovation
events.description: Hear from alumni founders and investors about launching startups, fundraising, and balancing risk.

events.name: Chicago Scholarship Benefit Dinner
events.description: An elegant evening in support of student scholarships, featuring a keynote from a scholarship recipient and live music.

events.name: San Francisco Alumni Career Paths in Software
events.description: A panel discussion from 2025 featuring alumni software engineers sharing their career journeys and advice.

chapters.name: Chicago Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: The primary hub for alumni living and working in the greater Chicago area, hosting networking nights, lectures, and family-friendly gatherings throughout the year.
chapters.membership_fee_description: Annual dues support local events and student scholarships from the Chicago region.

chapters.name: New York City Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: A vibrant community of alumni across all five boroughs, with events focused on finance, media, technology, and the arts.
chapters.membership_fee_description: Annual membership includes priority registration for select NYC events.

chapters.name: San Francisco Bay Area Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: A large and active chapter serving alumni in San Francisco, Oakland, San Jose, and the broader Bay Area, with a strong focus on technology and innovation.
chapters.membership_fee_description: Modest annual dues that help underwrite frequent tech meetups and family events.

chapters.name: California Statewide Alumni Network
chapters.description: A virtual-first network connecting alumni across California who are not located near a major city-based chapter.
chapters.membership_fee_description: Low-cost annual membership supporting statewide virtual programs and webinars.

chapters.name: Los Angeles Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: An entertainment- and media-focused chapter bringing together alumni from film, television, tech, and related industries in the LA area.
chapters.membership_fee_description: Annual dues include access to select studio tours and panel events.

chapters.name: San Diego Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: A growing community of alumni in San Diego and surrounding areas, with casual social gatherings and occasional career-focused programs.
chapters.membership_fee_description: Annual dues help fund beach meetups, service days, and student send-off events.

chapters.name: Pacific Northwest Alumni Chapter (Seattle)
chapters.description: Connects alumni across the Pacific Northwest, with events centered on technology, outdoor activities, and community service.
chapters.membership_fee_description: Suggested annual contribution to support regional programming.

chapters.name: Texas Alumni Chapter (Austin)
chapters.description: A statewide chapter anchored in Austin, bringing together alumni from Dallas, Houston, San Antonio, and beyond.
chapters.membership_fee_description: Annual dues support networking events, game watches, and service projects across Texas.

chapters.name: Washington, D.C. Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: A policy- and public-service-focused community for alumni in Washington, D.C., Maryland, and Northern Virginia.
chapters.membership_fee_description: Annual membership supports policy forums, networking, and student internship events.

chapters.name: Boston & New England Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: Serving alumni throughout New England with a mix of social, cultural, and career development events.
chapters.membership_fee_description: Annual dues fund local gatherings and joint programs with nearby universities.

chapters.name: London & UK Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: An international chapter connecting alumni living in London and throughout the United Kingdom.
chapters.membership_fee_description: Annual contribution to support receptions, speaker events, and mentoring for UK-based students.

chapters.name: Hong Kong & Greater Bay Alumni Chapter
chapters.description: Brings together alumni in Hong Kong, Shenzhen, Guangzhou, and the Greater Bay Area for professional networking and community-building.
chapters.membership_fee_description: No mandatory dues; voluntary contributions welcome to support local programming.
